---
title: "Teaching Hub"
---

# Machine Learning Summer School 2026

This is the central hub for the 3-day machine learning block.

## Course Flow

- Monday: foundations, over/underfitting, regularization
- Tuesday: two cultures, trees, and modern modeling pipelines
- Thursday: advanced models, metrics, imbalance, and interpretability

## Day-by-Day Slides

- [Day 1 (Monday)](slides/day-01-monday.qmd)
- [Day 2 (Tuesday)](slides/day-02-tuesday.qmd)
- [Day 3 (Thursday)](slides/day-03-thursday.qmd)

## Planning and Reusable Content

- [Curriculum Outline](curriculum-outline.qmd)
- [Module Library](modules/index.qmd)
- [App Library](apps/index.qmd)
- Shared `tidymodels` pipeline: `_includes/tidymodels-pipeline.qmd` (included in Tuesday and Thursday slides and in Module 04)

## Notes

- Exercises are intentionally handled outside this slide system.
- Each deck includes semi-drafted content and app placeholders.
